title: API Testing with Playwright
description: Use Playwright for API testing alongside UI tests.

sections.title: Introduction to API Testing with Playwright
sections.content:
# API Testing with Playwright

Leverage Playwright's API testing capabilities for comprehensive test coverage.

This lesson covers essential concepts and practical techniques you need to master this topic.

sections.title: Code Example
sections.explanation: This example demonstrates practical usage of API Testing with Playwright concepts.

sections.title: Real-World Application
sections.content:
## Practical Use Cases

In real-world scenarios, api testing with playwright is essential for:

- Solving common testing challenges
- Improving test reliability and maintainability
- Enhancing test execution efficiency
- Building robust automation frameworks

sections.title: Best Practices
sections.content:
## Best Practices for API Testing with Playwright

1. Always follow industry standards
2. Write maintainable and readable code
3. Consider performance implications
4. Document your test logic
5. Handle edge cases appropriately

keyTakeaways: API Testing with Playwright is essential for effective test automation
Understanding these concepts improves test quality and reliability
Apply these techniques to solve real-world testing challenges
Follow best practices for maintainable test code
Master API Testing with Playwright for professional test automation
